race.comment: SACRED BULL (4) peaks and has been around the mark without winning. Got too far back as a $4.4F stepping up to 2100m at the Sunshine Coast a month ago and will have taken benefit from that. Has a 2kg claim and the blinkers on again and should go close with average luck.  FIRE AND LIGHT (3) is knocking on the door and there was a lot to like about his near miss over this trip at Toowoomba. Raced favourite in that at 60 level and has winning claims. DOWN UNDER STUNNAH (8) won here three back and has raced in stronger since. Had a tough run from an outside barrier beaten 2.7L at the Gold Coast last time.  May have to do it the hard way again but can make the finish with average luck. HELL FOLLOWS (10) disappointed as favourite here second-up but the extra metres should suit. They've scratched a fancied stablemate.
